name: Shrimp Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1 pound cooked shrimp, shelled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta until al dente, then drain well and toss with 2 tablespoons of olive oil. Set aside to cool.
2. In a separate bowl, mix together the remaining olive oil, lemon juice, herbs (tarragon and rosemary), salt, and Tabasco sauce. Taste and adjust seasonings as needed.
3. In a serving bowl, combine the cooled pasta, shrimp, and dressing. Add chopped parsley and toss gently.
4. Cover and let the flavors blend for about half an hour. If the salad won't be served for more than half an hour, refrigerate it.
5. Just before serving, give the salad a final toss to ensure all ingredients are well combined.
